response.justification: Despite a long and diverse engineering career, the candidate lacks demonstrable professional C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains — the core requirement. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/thesis work and NI LabWindows, with no evidence of financial systems, SQL Server/Oracle, or Windows-specific dev environments. His dominant skills are in JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, making him a poor fit for this specialized role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and real-time environments
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows in financial markets
Lacks demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience in enterprise financial systems
Domain expertise is in GIS, IoT, and web platforms — not fixed income or capital markets
